notes: Sysop's six-face die. WILD face gates on Doctrine banked.

faces.description: Success ★★. The terminal wakes; the modem chirps; the room is ready.
Partial. Spend 1 Doctrine to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 1 Doctrine to convert to ★.
Failure. The packet was dropped. +1 Doctrine.
Wild. Counts as ★ if you have at least 1 Doctrine banked; counts as failure otherwise.
